content:
goose migration PostgreSQL ENUM: Use -- +goose Up / -- +goose Down markers. CREATE TYPE inside Up section, DROP TYPE in Down. All SQL statements need semicolons. Default all migrations run in transactions. CREATE TYPE is transaction-safe in PostgreSQL. Example: -- +goose Up
CREATE TYPE event_type AS ENUM ('pee', 'poo', 'both', 'accident', 'tried');
-- +goose Down
DROP TYPE event_type; Drop order in Down must be reverse of creation order (tables before types).
